overview.description: Czech nonprofit AI education initiative helping schools prepare students for an AI-driven world
overview.description_long: AI dětem (AI for Children) is a Czech nonprofit registered association (z.s.) founded in March 2022. It is a leader in AI education in the Czech Republic, helping schools, educators, and children understand and use artificial intelligence responsibly. The organization operates on three pillars: (1) creating free educational and methodical materials including an AI curriculum for primary and secondary schools, (2) running training workshops, webinars, AI academies, after-school clubs, summer camps, and an AI Olympiad for students, and (3) developing technology solutions for schools — most notably the 'Tiny [Tajny]' app, an AI assistant and mentor for educators and pupils. The organization also runs an 'AI Accelerator' programme providing systemic support for schools undergoing digital transformation.
overview.tagline: Pomáháme školám připravovat budoucí generace na proměnlivý svět

history.origin_story: Founded in March 2022 by Eva Nečasová and Jitka Šimková to improve AI and digital literacy in Czech schools

key_milestones.event: Founded in March 2022 as a registered nonprofit association (z.s.)
AI Awards 2023 – first place in the Education category
Secured Google.org Impact Challenge: Tech for Social Good grant for Tiny app development
SDGs 2024 award in the Education category
AI Awards 2025 – first place in the Education category
Eva Nečasová named most influential woman in education by Vogue CZ

investors: Google.org Impact Challenge: Tech for Social Good

notable_people.name: Eva Nečasová
notable_people.note: Named most influential woman in education by Vogue CZ (2025); Moje Heroine award from Heroine magazine (2025)

awards: Eva Nečasová: Most influential woman in education (Vogue CZ, 2025)
partnerships: prg.ai (Elements of AI course in Czech)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: AI dětem is a nonprofit education initiative; its value lies in community-building, teacher training, and pedagogical design rather than AI product development. Not subject to AGI commoditization risk.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: As a nonprofit focused on public-good AI education in Czech schools, it operates outside commercial market dynamics. Demand for AI literacy education is growing.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: The organisation depends on grants and donations (Google.org, Czech Savings Bank Foundation, Tykač Family Foundation) without recurring commercial revenue. Grants can be discontinued, making long-term sustainability uncertain.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: AI dětem is a well-recognised nonprofit with multiple prestigious grants, strong media presence, and award-winning programmes. The primary risk is grant dependency, but the organisation is well-positioned with diverse funders and growing public sector relevance in Czech AI education policy.

metadata.notes: AI dětem (AI for Children) is a Czech nonprofit (z.s.) IČ: 17914582. No CNAIP entry. Website is aidetem.cz (WordPress). The 'Tiny [Tajny]' app is a separately developed AI assistant product within the organisation. Founded March 2022 by Eva Nečasová and Jitka Šimková.
